violations.name: Riding without Helmet

violations.name: Modified Exhaust (Noise Pollution)
violations.description: Using a non-compliant or modified exhaust/silencer that violates noise emission limits.

violations.name: Carrying Children without Safety Harness
violations.description: Carrying a child under 4 years old without a safety harness or an approved helmet.

violations.description: Riding a two-wheeler without holding a valid driving license.

violations.name: Drunk Driving
violations.description: Driving under the influence of alcohol (blood alcohol content exceeding 30 mg per 100 ml) or drugs.

violations.name: Using Mobile Phone while Driving
violations.description: Using a handheld mobile phone, texting, or using interactive communication devices while driving.

violations.name: Red Light Jump
violations.description: Failing to stop at a red signal or disobeying standard traffic signals and markings.

violations.name: Driving without Valid Insurance

violations.name: Wrong-way Driving

violations.name: Riding without Helmet
violations.description: Riding a motorcycle without wearing an approved safety helmet in Abu Dhabi. 4 black points.

violations.name: Dangerous Swerving / Reckless Riding
violations.description: Swerving dangerously between lanes in Abu Dhabi. 23 black points, vehicle impound.

violations.name: Running a Red Light
violations.description: Crossing a red signal on a motorcycle in Abu Dhabi. 12 black points, 30-day impound.

violations.name: Using Mobile Phone while Riding
violations.description: Using a handheld phone while riding a motorcycle in Abu Dhabi. 4 black points.

violations.name: Not Wearing Seat Belt
violations.description: Driver or passenger not wearing a seat belt in Abu Dhabi. 4 black points.

violations.name: Speeding (up to 20 km/h over)
violations.description: Exceeding the posted speed limit by up to 20 km/h in Abu Dhabi.

violations.name: Speeding (21-40 km/h over)
violations.description: Exceeding the posted speed limit by 21-40 km/h in Abu Dhabi. 6 black points.

violations.name: Speeding (41-60 km/h over)
violations.description: Exceeding the posted speed limit by 41-60 km/h in Abu Dhabi. 12 black points.

violations.name: Drunk Driving / Driving Under Influence
violations.description: Driving under the influence in Abu Dhabi. Zero-tolerance policy. Criminal prosecution applicable.

violations.name: Using Handheld Phone while Driving
violations.description: Using a handheld mobile phone while driving in Abu Dhabi. 4 black points.

violations.name: Running a Red Light
violations.description: Crossing a red signal in Abu Dhabi. 12 black points, 30-day vehicle impound.

violations.name: Driving without Valid Insurance
violations.description: Driving without valid motor vehicle insurance in Abu Dhabi. 4 black points.

violations.name: Overloading / Exceeding Weight Limit
violations.description: Operating a commercial vehicle exceeding gross weight in Abu Dhabi.

violations.name: Unsecured / Spilling Load
violations.description: Transporting goods that are not secured or that spill onto the road in Abu Dhabi.

violations.name: Drunk Driving (Commercial)
violations.description: Operating a commercial vehicle under influence in Abu Dhabi. Criminal charges apply.
